name: Ed Byrne
bio: Ed Byrne is an Irish comedian and actor known for sharp, pedantic and self-aware observational stand-up. After being nominated for the Perrier Award in 1998, he built a long touring career and became one of the most frequent panellists on Mock the Week. He has appeared widely on British and Irish television and travel programmes.

timeline.ev: Nominated for the Perrier Comedy Award at the Edinburgh Festival Fringe
Tours and records the DVD Pedantic and Whimsical
Records the live DVD Different Class in Glasgow
Becomes a frequent panellist on Mock the Week
Travels the Pan-American Highway in Dara and Eds Great Big Adventure
Continues national touring with the show Tragedy Plus Time

accolades: Most frequent guest panellist on Mock the Week
Numerous sell-out Edinburgh Fringe runs and UK tours
